long_description:
[NETWORK]-Genctl-Network-Pod-CrashLoopBackOff [WDC] is Triggered

TIP Runbook URL: https://pages.github.ibm.com/cloudlab/internal-docs/troubleshooting_pods_crash_loopback.html
TIP Situation: Observed kube-error-pod crashloopbackoff issue in genctl-network-prod
TIP Short Description: Pods in crashloopbackoff
 TIP Console: toc
TIP CRN: crn:v1:::is-network-genctl:::mzone757:microservice:fabcon-manager-thj6j
IPOPS Enabled: False

Event Generated:

Severity:         High
Metric:
    sum(kube_pod_container_status_waiting_reason{kube_pod_name=~"network-manager.*|fabcon-manager.*|fabcon-edge-manager.*|foreign-endpoint-projector.*|net-control-cleanup.*.*", reason!~"ContainerCreating" ,kube_cluster_name !~"us-south-ngdc-test.*"} * on(kube_node_name) group_left(kube_cluster_name) kube_node_sysdig_ready{kube_cluster_name=~".*mzone.*"}) by (kube_node_name, kube_pod_name, kube_cluster_name, reason) > 0 = 1
Segment:
    kube_cluster_name = 'mzone757' and kube_node_name = 'wdc1-qz1-sr3-rk019-s08' and kube_pod_name = 'fabcon-manager-thj6j' and reason = 'CrashLoopBackOff'

Time:             12/07/2025 08:32 AM UTC
State:            Triggered
Notification URL: https://us-east.monitoring.cloud.ibm.com:443/api/oauth/openid/IBM/2c4a1985f9d5c10bd4842d2d3989088e/a22d4a2e-0c44-4662-91bc-3607d0e2348f?redirectRoute=%2Fevents%2Fnotifications%2Fl%3A2419200%2F44010571%2Fdetails
